claim: The C-bootstrap -> fkwu -> form-cli runtime runs LIVE on Android hardware with no go/rust/clang/python on the device, computing the four-way-proven verdicts of the body's recipes.
north_star: all work c-bootstrap fkwu form-cli observed on all platforms (mac, windows, android) w/o go, rust, clang, python — the body on its own emitted universal kernel, no rented toolchain
what_closed: The Android live-on-device gap. Previously: form-elf band proved fkwu EMITS android arm64 bytes (four-way), but the kernel had never been observed RUNNING on a phone. Now observed.

method.1_emit: uni.c (the universal kernel's C) emitted from the Go kernel via fkc-emit-universal — build-host bootstrap only, nothing from it on the device
method.2_cross_compile: zig cc -target aarch64-linux-musl -O2 -static (no Android NDK, no clang on device); arc4random -> rand() alias (same as build_fourth's Windows lane). Result: 1.53MB static aarch64 ELF.
method.3_device: push ONLY the static fkwu binary + each band's pre-flattened table to /data/local/tmp; device confirmed to have no go/rust/clang/cc/python/gcc
method.4_run: fkwu <table> 0 | head -1 — the exact invocation validate.sh uses — verdict compared to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt (manifest) AND the Mac fkwu

receipt.note: Different verdicts per recipe (127, 255) prove fkwu genuinely computes each recipe on-device, not echoing. A first attempt via the wrong arg form (fkwu TBL 0 BUNDLE) printed a recipe-INDEPENDENT 128-bit vector — caught as a false-proof and corrected to validate's real invocation (fkwu TBL 0 | head -1).

mac.live: bootstrap-host posix PASS + fkwu native runtime (build)

android.live: OBSERVED — fkwu static-musl, 7 bands verdict-identical on S23 Ultra

windows.live: verify_cross_platform_bootstrap_host_no_go.ps1 lane (not run this session — no Windows hardware reachable)

honest_gaps_remaining: Windows live-on-device: no Windows hardware reachable from this build host; form-pe-coff band + the no-go .ps1 lane stand in.

fkwu standing-wall op families (node/substrate parity beyond the generated table, broader host-io source-scans, multi-line mid-walk output): missing op FAMILIES, never divergences — the only honest 'not yet native on fkwu' answers (capabilities.sh).
durable_lane: scripts/verify_fkwu_android_no_go.sh — repeatable; emits, cross-compiles, pushes, runs, asserts against the manifest; skips gracefully without go/zig/adb/device.
